_meta.note: REAL @statusmap/core test run, captured for the self-roadmap demo. Ground truth — the library ingests this via parseVitestJson + applyCoverageTests to build the failing-first proof trees you see. Slimmed to the fields the parser reads.

assertionResults.title: a pass raises proof at most to owning_e2e, never fabricates destination
a real fail forces health down (built-but-broken reads red)
never downgrades a hand-authored destination on a machine pass
honours producer precedence — the higher-ranked verdict wins for one target
unknown / blocked verdicts keep the hand snapshot
parses assertions into results with suite paths
rolls a suite up to failed when any leaf fails, tallying descendants
captures spec status + e2e steps, failing a step that has an error
matches by file token and requires every group token in suite/name
strips dirs + spec/test extensions and lowercases
merges vitest + playwright artifacts
overlays a run tree onto the intent whose owningE2e matches, leaving others untouched
builds a validated bundle from a { path: rawYaml } map (splits areas vs features, skips _ files)
loads + validates clean
skips the _template.yaml authoring aid
rolls the whole app up honestly (deferred + planned drag it below half)
projects into the three explorer levels
adds a value to an empty group without mutating the input
removes a present value and drops an emptied group (canonical form)
toggles independently per group
does not duplicate when toggling distinct values into a group
adds all values when none/some are present
ancestorTitles: toggleGroup — set-wise toggle of a preset

assertionResults.title: removes the whole set when every value is already present
ancestorTitles: toggleGroup — set-wise toggle of a preset

assertionResults.title: adds only the missing values when partially present, without duplicating
ancestorTitles: toggleGroup — set-wise toggle of a preset

assertionResults.title: does not mutate the input
ancestorTitles: toggleGroup — set-wise toggle of a preset

assertionResults.title: sets non-blank text
blank/whitespace clears it
does not mutate the input
returns the inactive (empty) state
isValueActive reflects membership
activeCount sums tones + verdicts + areas + (1 if text)
isFilterActive agrees with activeCount > 0
writes only non-empty dimensions with the documented keys
an inactive state yields no params
parses a query string, ignoring unknown keys (view/area/feature co-exist)
accepts a plain record and a URLSearchParams alike
round-trips {} to an identical state
round-trips {"tones":["red"]} to an identical state
round-trips {"verdicts":["failing","blocked"]} to an identical state
round-trips {"areas":["a1","a2"]} to an identical state
round-trips {"text":"free text search"} to an identical state
round-trips {"tones":["red","blocked"],"verdicts":["failing"],"areas":["core"],"text":"note"} to an identical state
round-trips {"tones":["yellow","red","blocked","stale","planned","unknown"]} to an identical state
round-trips a STRING form too (toString → parse)
trims whitespace in list values and the text on parse
an empty state is inactive (full map)
any non-empty dimension activates
is a no-op when no dimension is set
ancestorTitles: filterLedger — empty state returns the full ledger

assertionResults.title: "Needs attention" drops the fully-live feature, keeps non-live work
"failing" keeps only features containing a failing intent; intent-less leaf dropped
matches the verdicts intentVerdictCategories assigns
keeps only features in the selected area(s)
OR-within areas keeps features from any listed area
matches an intent label (case-insensitive), pruning to the matching intent
ancestorTitles: filterLedger — text dimension matches labels + summaries

assertionResults.title: matches a feature summary even when no single intent matches (keeps all intents)
ancestorTitles: filterLedger — text dimension matches labels + summaries

assertionResults.title: matches a workflow note via the intent haystack
ancestorTitles: filterLedger — text dimension matches labels + summaries

ancestorTitles: filterLedger — text dimension matches labels + summaries

assertionResults.title: tones AND verdicts intersect at the intent level
text AND area intersect
area AND verdict intersect (area gates before the leaf verdict)
prunes areas with no surviving features
reports shown vs total features
the deprecated `statuses` key is honored as the tone axis

assertionResults.title: maps proofLevel + passing to a verdict
a heuristic stays weak (yellow) even when passing
not_built / planned → Not built
health down → Blocked
counts workflow blockers
a clean intent shows NO flag (absence is the signal)
collects down workflows + noted partial workflows
derives tested + blocking + blockers + coverage chips onto the card
omits the brand by default, applies it when given
threads the basePath into drill links
every example YAML is free of source-app-specific identifiers
ancestorTitles: no internal data leaks into the published example

assertionResults.title: classifies the tested axis
adds blocking categories (an intent can be several at once)
is a no-op when no filter is active
status: "Needs attention" drops the fully-live feature, keeps non-live work
verdict: "failing" keeps only features containing a failing intent; intent-less leaf dropped
AND-combines the two axes at the intent level
prunes areas with no surviving features
reviewFilterSummary reports shown vs total
only live is fully up; deferred/planned/not_built/unknown are down
weights up=100, partial=50, down=0
rolls a feature set up to an honest % (deferred + not-built drag it down)
rollupTone thresholds: >=80 green, >=34 yellow, else red; empty neutral
lifecycleTone keeps the build nuance the health axis flattens
intent health averages its workflows
a feature health override wins over lifecycle
resolves every tone to a family + four package-namespaced tokens + a label
collapses the health + planning vocab onto the five families
exposes tone vars for inline styles
